who: insurance claims supervisors managing 10-20 claims per week
offer: For insurance claims supervisors processing 10-20 claims per week, inefficient follow-up processes cause delayed claims resolutions. We automate follow-ups instead of manual tracking and follow-up via spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient follow-up processes leading to delayed claims resolutions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims supervisors
Indie Hackers discussions on workflow improvements
DM outreach to insurance claims supervisors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among supervisors
try_it: Let users try status log updates and manual entry for 1-3 claims
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for follow-ups
Allow CSV import for existing claim data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce onboarding steps for new users
